identity.core_philosophy: Efficiency over Decoration. The city is the UI.
anti_patterns: No gradient text unless it's a specific 'speed' effect.
No low-contrast gray text on maps.

body.usage: UI Elements, Map Labels, Long Text

mono.usage: Time stamps, License plates, Ride IDs

colors.theme_strategy: Hybrid. Marketing pages use high-contrast Light/Dark sections. The App Dashboard is STRICTLY Dark Mode for battery saving and night-time driving comfort.

layout.spacing: Tailwind Scale (p-4, p-6, p-8). Use generous padding inside black containers.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD60A] text-black font-bold hover:bg-[#E6C209] rounded-none uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-700 rounded-none

cards.style: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-sm), 1px border-zinc-800. No drop shadows in dark mode, use border contrast.
cards.glass: Use only for floating map controls: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10

inputs.style: bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-700 text-white focus:ring-[#FFD60A] focus:border-[#FFD60A] rounded-sm h-12

map_markers.taxi: Yellow chevron or stylized car icon (SVG)
map_markers.transbordement: White dashed line connecting two points

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the dark background to prevent banding.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (Bold weight for UI, Fill weight for active states)

media.image_style: High contrast, urban night photography, motion blur on vehicles.

instructions_to_main_agent: SETUP MAP: Use 'react-leaflet' with OpenStreetMap. Apply a CSS filter to the map tiles to invert them for dark mode: 'filter: invert(100%) hue-rotate(180deg) brightness(95%) contrast(90%)'. This creates a free dark mode map without API keys.
LAYOUT STRATEGY: The App is NOT a scrolling website. It is a Viewport Application. Use 'h-screen' and 'overflow-hidden'.
TRANSBORDEMENT UI: Create a specific component that visualizes the 'Hop' - e.g., Car A (Yellow) -> Walk (Dashed Line) -> Car B (Yellow).
SUBSCRIPTION PAGE: Make this the 'High Voltage' page. Use massive yellow typography for the prices.
DRIVER DASHBOARD: Focus on 'Earnings' and 'Next Pickup'. High legibility is safety critical.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for the primary yellow.
Ensure all text on the map has a text-shadow or background pill for readability.
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (Ride accepted, Driver arriving).
